# Brandtrove

> Brandtrove designs and executes strategic collaborations between brands and athletes, celebrities, and influencers—building visibility, credibility, and cultural relevance across India and global markets.

Brandtrove (https://brandtroveglobal.com) is a strategic brand partnerships agency headquartered in Delhi, India. We structure sports collaborations, celebrity endorsements, influencer campaigns, brand partnerships, and experiential activations for FMCG, technology, finance, lifestyle, entertainment, and growth-stage brands.

Contact: info@brandtroveglobal.com | Phone: +91 9817303991

For complete structured content, see https://brandtroveglobal.com/llms-full.txt

## Services

- [Sports Collaborations](https://brandtroveglobal.com/sports-collaborations/): Athlete partnerships, endorsements, league tie-ups, and sports activations
- [Influencer & Creator](https://brandtroveglobal.com/influencer-creator/): Data-driven creator campaigns across platforms and Indian regional markets
- [Brand Partnerships](https://brandtroveglobal.com/brand-partnerships/): Celebrity and entertainment alliances aligned with brand positioning
- [Events & Experiences](https://brandtroveglobal.com/events-experiences/): Launches, hybrid activations, and experiential brand campaigns
- [All Services](https://brandtroveglobal.com/services/): Overview of partnership capabilities and engagement models

## Company

- [About Brandtrove](https://brandtroveglobal.com/about/): Mission, vision, values, and partnership philosophy
- [How It Works](https://brandtroveglobal.com/how-it-works/): Discovery, strategy, execution, and performance framework
- [Industries](https://brandtroveglobal.com/industries/): Sector-specific partnership strategies (FMCG, tech, finance, lifestyle)
- [Global Reach](https://brandtroveglobal.com/global-reach/): Pan-India execution with cross-border partnership capability
- [Case Studies](https://brandtroveglobal.com/case-studies/): Partnership programs with measurable outcomes
- [FAQ](https://brandtroveglobal.com/faq/): Common questions about services, timelines, budgets, and engagement
- [Contact](https://brandtroveglobal.com/contact/): Start a strategic partnership inquiry

## Case Studies

- [FMCG Cricket Season Campaign](https://brandtroveglobal.com/case-studies/fmcg-cricket-season-campaign/): Regional recall at scale through structured sports partnerships
- [Regional Creator Program — D2C](https://brandtroveglobal.com/case-studies/regional-influencer-d2c-scale/): Tier-2/3 creator scale with governance and KPIs
- [Celebrity Endorsement Restructure](https://brandtroveglobal.com/case-studies/celebrity-fit-endorsement-restructure/): Fit-over-fame partnership architecture
- [Hybrid Tech Product Launch](https://brandtroveglobal.com/case-studies/hybrid-tech-product-launch/): Integrated event + digital activation
